about.title: About Me
about.full_bio:
Hi! I'm Ramiro Urteaga, a Frontend developer with a Full-Stack mindset and an innate curiosity for technology.
My story with the digital world began long before writing my first line of code: as a child, my favorite hobby was taking apart toys and electronic devices to understand the logic behind how they worked. That analytical mindset led me to found my own hardware and software repair venture, a stage that forged my autonomy, critical diagnostic skills, and effective communication.
Over time, that passion for physical components evolved into software architecture. Today, I work as a developer with experience in the modern web ecosystem. In the Frontend, I specialize in using TypeScript, React, and Next.js.
As for the Backend, I have the versatility to work in various environments such as Node.js, Python, and C#. This technical foundation is complemented by solid data management, handling both MySQL and MongoDB databases. This combination allows me to have a 360° vision of every project.
I am motivated to contribute to environments that value code quality and the development of functional solutions with real impact. For me, programming is a creative process that flows better with background music and, of course, a good mate always at hand.
about.mate_signature: "True believer that there is no code without a good mate by your side."

exp3.description: Web interface development using Next.js and TypeScript, prioritizing reusable components, strict typing, and code scalability. Implementation of full functionalities. User experience improvement through flow optimization and visual feedback. Team collaboration using Git, pull requests, and code reviews.

exp1.description: Creation of flyers and graphic materials to attract students. Social media management and digital content strategies along with administrative tasks.

exp2.description: Diagnosis and repair of mobile devices (Android/iOS) and computers. System optimization and data recovery.

14.title: Full Check
14.description: This project is a landing page developed with Next.js, JavaScript, and CSS, designed for a mechanical workshop. Its goal is to provide a modern, intuitive, and fully responsive interface so that customers can learn about the company's services and contact them easily.

15.title: ImageConverter
15.description: An image converter developed in Python using the Pillow (PIL) library. It allows converting individual or multiple images within a folder to various popular formats.

1.title: Entre Amigos
1.description: Landing page for a construction company with a modern and responsive interface. Implements integration with payment gateways and 3D elements.

2.title: Urbanblock
2.description: Website for a construction company focused on visualizing architectural projects using Three.js for immersive experiences.

13.title: Web Scraper
13.description: Automation script developed in Python for extracting and processing data from external sources.

3.title: Coquette Studio
3.description: High fashion digital gallery designed to reflect elegance and minimalism, optimized for showcasing fashion designs.

8.title: VideoConverter
8.description: Utility tool for converting YouTube links to MP3 format, processed in a Node.js environment.

4.title: BikeShop
4.description: Landing page for a professional bike shop, focused on maintenance services and a product catalog with a dynamic design.

5.title: Educatina
5.description: Online course management platform with an intuitive navigation system and a design focused on academic conversion.

6.title: Scaloneta ₓ Guayerd
6.description: Interactive application with real-time maps and data grids about the Argentine National Team. My first firm step into web development.

7.title: Wingu ₓ Guayerd
7.description: Solidarity donation system with login integration and automatic post-donation email management using Apex.

9.title: Aloha Aromas
9.description: E-commerce specialized in wellness products with an administration panel for inventory and stock management.

10.title: 3Deseos
10.description: Community for sharing and downloading 3D prosthesis models, integrating Firebase for comment and rating management.

11.title: Grill House
11.description: Gastronomic landing page that highlights the visual identity and services of a grill house restaurant.

12.title: Chess Game
12.description: Functional chess application that tests programming logic and complex state management in React.

welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.message: You can navigate through the sections by typing directly in the URL or using the arrows in the header bar.

notFound.dinoMessage: It seems this page doesn't exist. Play a bit in the meantime!

simonBio.p1: Hi! I'm Ramiro's four-legged assistant. To be honest, I got a bit lost looking for a toy and ended up here.
simonBio.p2: While Ramiro fixes this link (or throws the ball for me), you should consider giving him a job. He's a genius with <1>React and TypeScript</1>, and I'm an expert at making sure he doesn't move from his chair until the code is finished. It's a winning team!
simonBio.p3: Ramiro says he's a <1>Frontend developer</1>, but I just see colored lights on the monitor while I sleep at his feet. Hire him so he can keep buying me those expensive treats I like so much. I promise not to bark in Zoom meetings.
simonBio.p4: Designed and coded from scratch with a lot of love by Ramiro. Code optimized by mate; UI tested and approved by Simon💛
